Description: Manage view state with @State for local @Binding for child views and @StateObject for observable models
Do: Use @State for simple local state; @StateObject for owned ObservableObject; @Binding for passed state
Dont: Use @ObservedObject for owned objects; mix @State with observed objects
Code Bad: struct MyView: View {\n  @ObservedObject var vm = MyViewModel() // Wrong! New instance each rebuild\n}

Description: Structure apps with View-ViewModel-Model pattern leveraging Observable macro
Do: Use @Observable for ViewModels; keep Views thin; inject dependencies through environment
Dont: Put business logic in Views; use global singletons; skip ViewModel for complex screens

Description: Navigate with NavigationStack and navigationDestination for type-safe deep linkable navigation
Do: Use NavigationStack with path; use navigationDestination for type-safe routing; support deep links
Dont: Use NavigationLink(destination:) directly; hardcode navigation logic in views

Description: Use SwiftData (Swift macro-based) for local data persistence replacing CoreData
Do: Use @Model macro; configure ModelContainer; use @Query for reactive fetching
Dont: Use manual CoreData stack for new projects; ignore migration planning
Code Bad: // CoreData manual stack\nlet container = NSPersistentContainer(name: 'Model')\n// 50+ lines of boilerplate

Description: Use async/await actors and structured concurrency for safe concurrent code
Do: Use async/await; use actors for shared state; use TaskGroup for parallel work; use .task modifier
Dont: Use completion handlers; GCD dispatch directly; ignore actor isolation warnings

Description: Test SwiftUI views and view models with the new Swift Testing framework
Do: Use @Test macro; test ViewModels directly; use #expect instead of XCTAssert
Dont: Skip ViewModel tests; only test with UI tests; use XCTest for new projects

Description: Use SwiftUI modifiers for styling layout and behavior in a declarative composable way
Do: Chain modifiers logically; create custom modifiers for reuse; use ViewModifier protocol
Dont: Apply conflicting modifiers; repeat modifier chains across views
Code Bad:
// Repeating modifiers everywhere
Text('Hello')
  .padding()
  .background(Color.white)
  .clipShape(RoundedRectangle(cornerRadius: 12))
  .shadow(radius: 4)
// Same chain in 20 places

Description: Pass dependencies through the SwiftUI environment for testable composable architecture
Do: Use @Environment for system values; custom EnvironmentKey for app services; use protocol-based injection
Dont: Pass dependencies through init chains; use singletons; hardcode dependencies
Code Bad: struct LoginView: View {\n  let authService = AuthService() // Hardcoded, untestable\n}
